summary: Iteration 60: Batch video generation endpoints and PWA features tested. All 21 backend tests pass. Frontend features verified: Generate All button, Cosmic Cinema tab with badge count (2), video player modal, scroll-to-top, back-to-top FAB, PWA manifest, service worker, Apple meta tags.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 complete. Batch video generation and PWA features verified: (1) POST /api/ai-visuals/generate-batch returns batch_id and starts generation. (2) GET /api/ai-visuals/batch-status/{batch_id} returns status with completed/total counts. (3) Videos page shows 'Generate All' button in Cosmic Cinema info bar when logged in. (4) Cosmic Cinema tab shows badge with cached video count (2). (5) Mayan and Norse cards show 'Watch Cinematic' button and SORA 2 badge. (6) Other 13 cards show 'Generate Video' button. (7) Video player modal opens with video element, controls, culture name, region, and SORA 2 badge. (8) Practice Videos tab shows video list with category filters. (9) Scroll-to-top works on route change (scrollY resets to 0). (10) Back-to-top FAB appears after scrolling 400px. (11) PWA manifest.json has correct icons, shortcuts, display: standalone. (12) Service worker registered. (13) Apple meta tags present (apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon). (14) Navigation mega-menus working. Two Sora 2 videos cached (Mayan, Norse).

backend_api.GET /api/ai-visuals/batch-status fields: PASS - returns batch_id, status, completed, total
backend_api.GET /api/ai-visuals/video-stories cached: PASS - returns 15 stories with has_video flag
backend_api.manifest.json required fields: PASS - name, short_name, icons, start_url, display
backend_api.manifest.json shortcuts: PASS - 4 shortcuts (Breathwork, Meditation, Sage, Daily Briefing)
